paper_title: Optimal Team Structure for Claude Code Instances

phase_ready.note: Research complete. 5 falsifiable claims presented. All require empirical validation before PHASE-READY.

claim_registry.label: Optimal Size Bound
claim_registry.statement: A team of 4 Claude Code instances (1 coordinator + 3 workers) produces higher quality output per wall-clock hour than any team of N where N in {1,2,3,5,6,7,8} on tasks with >=3 decomposable sub-components.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: A task class exists where team of N != 4 consistently outperforms the 4-instance team on quality-per-hour
falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Controlled experiment comparing team sizes on matched tasks with >=10 trials per condition
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: Applies only to tasks with >=3 decomposable sub-components; single-component tasks excluded
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: Claude Code instances with ~200K token lifespan, shared filesystem, hub-and-spoke topology

claim_registry.label: Hub-and-Spoke Efficiency
claim_registry.statement: Hub-and-spoke topology with filesystem-based communication preserves >=75% productive token efficiency per worker instance.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: Measured productive token efficiency in hub-and-spoke team < 75%
falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Instrument token counting in coordinator-worker exchanges over >=5 tasks
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: Standard Claude Code tasks; excludes pathological cases requiring >50 coordination events
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: Claude Code instances with ~200K token lifespan, JSON-schema communication protocol

claim_registry.label: Verifier Role Necessity
claim_registry.statement: Including a dedicated verifier instance reduces error propagation rate by >=50% compared to a team of 4 equal-role workers.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: Error rate reduction with dedicated verifier < 50%

WHERE.error_propagation: errors in output traceable to uncritical acceptance of upstream output
WHERE.control_group: 4 instances with equal roles (no dedicated verifier)

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Parallel experiments on matched task sets with error annotation by independent reviewer
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: Multi-step tasks where output of one sub-task feeds into another
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: Claude Code instances, hub-and-spoke topology, filesystem communication

claim_registry.label: Graceful Degradation
claim_registry.statement: The proposed team structure degrades gracefully from 4 to 1 instance with no protocol changes required.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: A failure mode exists where degradation from 4 to 1 requires protocol changes
falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Systematically remove instances and verify remaining instance(s) can continue using unmodified protocol
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: All degradation paths from 4 down to 1

claim_registry.label: Communication Cost Threshold
claim_registry.statement: Structured JSON inter-instance communication consumes <=50% of the tokens that natural-language communication requires for equivalent information transfer.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: JSON communication requires > 50% of the tokens of prose communication for equivalent information

WHERE.information_equivalence: Same task assignment, same completion signal, same review feedback
WHERE.prose_protocol: Natural language descriptions of same content

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Token-count both formats for >=20 matched communication events
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: Standard coordination messages (assignments, completions, reviews); excludes free-form reasoning

placeholder_register.description: Empirical validation of team size 4 vs alternatives requires controlled experiments not yet conducted
Token efficiency measurement requires instrumented team execution
Verifier impact measurement requires controlled A/B experiment
Degradation testing requires systematic instance removal experiments
Communication cost comparison requires token counting infrastructure
